descriptions: Added `Config.Billings`, `Config.Banks`, and `Config.Society` configuration options for extensive billing and banking system integration
Implemented universal invoice creation via `EDITABLE.CreateBilling` for officers, allowing support for multiple external billing and banking resources
Added `KickFromDutyJob` configuration object (`enabled`, `name`) to automatically set an off-duty job (e.g. `offpolice`) when kicking an officer from duty via the MDT
Ensured the player's job grade is fully preserved when they are transferred to the off-duty job
Added offline job update support across ESX, QBCore, and QBox for players kicked from duty while not in the server
Added `Config.Mugshot` configuration with `autoTake` option to allow disabling automatic mugshot capture when a player joins the server
Integrated Fivemanage API for mugshot uploads, allowing mugshots to be saved directly to Fivemanage instead of local server files (configured via `uploadType` and server convar keys)
